'''rahada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:readhesion|readhesion]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-h-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:readhesion|readhesion]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rahada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræhædæth|ræhædæth]] || [[word:ræhædæj|ræhædæj]] || [[word:ræhædæsh|ræhædæsh]] || [[word:ræhædæ|ræhædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rahahadath|rahahadath]] || [[word:rahahadaj|rahahadaj]] || [[word:rahahadash|rahahadash]] || [[word:rahahada|rahahada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rahadath|rahadath]] || [[word:rahadaj|rahadaj]] || [[word:rahadash|rahadash]] || [[word:rahada|rahada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rahafdath|rahafdath]] || [[word:rahafdaj|rahafdaj]] || [[word:rahafdash|rahafdash]] || [[word:rahafdaf|rahafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rahadatha|rahadatha]] || [[word:rahadaja|rahadaja]] || [[word:rahadasha|rahadasha]] || [[word:rahadaka|rahadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rahadath|rahadath]] || [[word:rahadaj|rahadaj]] || [[word:rahadash|rahadash]] || [[word:rahada|rahada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rahadathal|rahadathal]] || [[word:rahadajal|rahadajal]] || [[word:rahadashal|rahadashal]] || [[word:rahadakal|rahadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rahadathatha|rahadathatha]] || [[word:rahadajaja|rahadajaja]] || [[word:rahadashasha|rahadashasha]] || [[word:rahadaka|rahadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rahadathan|rahadathan]] || [[word:rahadajan|rahadajan]] || [[word:rahadashan|rahadashan]] || [[word:rahadakan|rahadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rahadathaoro|rahadathaoro]] || [[word:rahadajaoro|rahadajaoro]] || [[word:rahadashaoro|rahadashaoro]] || [[word:rahadakaoro|rahadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
